sections.paragraph: ἆρα [cp. ἄρα] interrogative marker expecting a negative answer and connoting anxiety or impatience, subject to varied rendering in English: at all, conceivably Lk 18:8; Gal 2:17. With γέ or οὖν: ἆρά γε γινώσϰεις ἃ ἀναγινώσϰεις; do you at all know what you are reading = do you have any idea what yoυ’re reading? Ac 8:30; w. οὖν Ro 7:25.
